properties.name: Bessarabia
properties.polygon_basis: Approximate boundary of the Russian Bessarabia Governorate (1812-1917). Bounded by the Prut River to the west (border with Romania/Moldavia), the Dniester River to the east (border with Podolia and Kherson governorates), the Danube and Black Sea to the south, and extending to Khotyn in the north. Shape follows these natural river boundaries approximately.
